issues.description: GiveDon action is missing the 'rest' effect. Card text specifies 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — the rest operation must be included as part of or following the GiveDon action.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text says 'during this turn' which means the power reduction lasts for the current turn only, not until end of turn.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On K.O.] Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn.
